package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for swagger_or_openapi_annotations_on_persistence_models: Persistence structs used as the public docs contract instead of transport DTOs.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule195NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule195NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule195NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario195Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule195NegativeService, input Rule195NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
